Gallery

See the atmosphere of our trips

A strong gallery says more than a long block of text. Here parents should feel the atmosphere of the trip and see real places and real moments.

Jaroslawiec

Seaside atmosphere, activity and summer energy

A seaside trip combines movement, shared fun, integration and relaxation. The gallery should show the real feeling of the camp, not just a few cropped shots.

Ostrow Pieckowskie

Masuria, nature and active rest

This destination has a calmer visual atmosphere, closer to nature, but still active and full of energy.

Poronin

Winter trip with a mountain character

Here the gallery should feel more dynamic and seasonal, with real winter moments and shared activities.

MK SPORT Camps for children

Camps and holiday trips for children and teenagers. Activity, good organization, parent communication and memorable trips.
